title: Upper Yard Battles Spread
description: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
scene: Across pages 15, 16, 17, 18, this scene centers on Luffy, Chopper, Gedatsu, Gan Fall, Eneru. Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We'll deal with the ship later.

dialogue.speaker: Gedatsu
dialogue.text: I will become a dependable man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Hey, Chopper!! Where's that weird ossan!!?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: He was hurt, too, wasn't he?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Yeah!! The Knight of the Sky....!!

dialogue.speaker: Gedatsu
dialogue.text: We'll go camping next to the lake!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ooookay... thanks for everyone's report. Good work!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: With everyone's information, many things became clear.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: However, the most important information is this!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Uh... I was reporting that earlier!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: because his gullet has been injured.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Nonetheless, with treasure up for grabs,

dialogue.speaker: Gedatsu
dialogue.text: This is a game of survival!

summary: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
